title: Certified Applied AI Safety Practitioner
description: Validates the ability to evaluate, red-team, and monitor production AI systems for safety-relevant failure modes.

title: Certified Security Engineer — Applied Cryptography
description: Covers key-management architecture, protocol analysis, and post-quantum migration planning.

title: Certified Site Reliability Professional
description: Demonstrates competency in incident response, capacity planning, and reliability instrumentation.
prerequisites: 1+ year in an operations or platform role

title: Certified Accessibility Engineer
description: Validates hands-on ability to audit, remediate, and architect for WCAG-conformant product experiences.

title: Certified Sustainable Systems Engineer
description: Covers carbon-aware architecture patterns, embodied-emissions accounting, and hardware lifecycle planning.
